milestone: v2_6_64 — Medium Swing Piano V1 Idiom Delta Audit Checkpoint
scope: Behavior-preserving V1→V2 Medium Swing piano idiom delta audit. This checkpoint studies V1 vocabulary/expression/history ideas and maps them to the existing V2 ChordRegion-first pattern architecture without changing runtime selection logic.

v1_reference.source: V1 Medium Swing Piano Comping Pattern Research Report

soft_hold.usage: main support, beat-1/3 anchors, cadence release

light_stab.usage: Charleston answer and light offbeat response

accent_stab.usage: push, 4& pickup, dominant approach, busy fill

translation_matrix.next_action: Keep calibrated by v2_6_58/v2_6_59 history ratios; do not add more generic cells before context subset policy.
Keep name and route region-first; do not restore two_chord_bar as a selector key.

translation_matrix.v2_translation: ChordRegion functional context candidate subset, not bar-level pattern templates
translation_matrix.next_action: v2_6_65 should add context-specific candidate subset priority before generic fallback.

translation_matrix.v2_translation: Phrase-role/context-gated candidate subset with active/busy guard, not gesture or voicing
translation_matrix.next_action: Defer until after progression subset; extend history scorer with active/fill/busy memory before enabling more fills.

translation_matrix.v2_translation: ending/last-region candidate subset + final_hold semantic hint
translation_matrix.next_action: Add ending subset later, after expression calibration; do not write MIDI durations in pattern.

translation_matrix.v2_translation: region-local tail-push risk + region-first anticipation compatibility
translation_matrix.next_action: v2_6_66 should reinforce no-4& / delayed-tail idioms using region-local tail slots.
v2_6_67 should add active/fill/busy/multi-region phrase memory, not bar-first two-bar phrase logic.

translation_matrix.v2_translation: ExpressionPolicy ranges; pattern carries semantic_expression_hint only
translation_matrix.next_action: v2_6_68 should calibrate ExpressionPolicy from V1 ranges while preserving hold_until_next_touch semantics.

translation_matrix.v1_signal: V1 expands rhythm templates into texture candidates
translation_matrix.v2_translation: Reject pattern-level texture expansion; keep voicing policy independent
translation_matrix.next_action: Keep shell2/rootless/drop2/drop3 in voicing policy only.

static: no bar-first/two-chord-bar markers remain in V2 candidates
static: V2 has active 1/2/4-beat region candidates
static: V2 keeps V1-derived expression semantic hints
static: V1 progression vocabulary is explicitly marked partial, not falsely accepted
static: V1 texture expansion is explicitly rejected from V2 pattern layer
